text.tspan: Overview of Tadpole: a) Tadpole is pre-trained as an autoencoder on single-channel crops of 3D PDE data generated on-the-
fly by a GPU-based solver with an efficient buffer strategy to eliminate I/O and storage bottlenecks. b) The pre-trained

tspan.tspan: Tadpole can be used for various downstream tasks, including autoencoding, dynamics learning with the novel Tadpole-DFT

text.tspan: method, and generative modeling via latent flow matching.
